metadata.description: Maps every known Legacy archetype name to a parent archetype with variant notes. Used by the AI to recognize deck names and understand relationships.

Delver / Tempo.description: Cheap threats backed by free countermagic (Force of Will, Daze) and mana denial (Wasteland). The defining Legacy tempo shell.

Dimir Tempo.notes: Current dominant build. Bowmasters + Tamiyo + Thoughtseize. The deck to beat.

Izzet Delver.notes: Classic Delver of Secrets + Lightning Bolt + Murktide Regent. Was tier 1 in 2021-2022.

UR Tempo.notes: Same as Izzet Delver. MTGTop8 naming convention.

Sultai Tempo.notes: BUG Delver variant with Tarmogoyf/Barrowgoyf + Abrupt Decay. Less popular post-DRS ban.

BUG Midrange.notes: Grindier BUG build with more planeswalkers and fewer Dazes.

Grixis Tempo.notes: UBR shell combining Bowmasters + Lightning Bolt. Less focused than Dimir or Izzet.

Temur Tempo.notes: RUG Delver successor. Tarmogoyf + Bolt + cantrips. Was tier 1 pre-W6 ban.

Canadian Threshold.notes: Original name for RUG Delver. Nimble Mongoose + Lightning Bolt + Stifle.

Jeskai Delver.notes: Delver + Swords to Plowshares + Stoneforge Mystic.

Jeskai Murktide.notes: Murktide Regent in a Jeskai shell with STP and Prismatic Ending.

Esper Tempo.notes: Rare UWB Delver build. Swords + Thoughtseize + Force.

Dimir Aggro.notes: More aggressive Dimir build without Murktide, lower curve.

Dimir Flash.notes: Flash-speed threats, all instants. Brazen Borrower + Bowmasters.

Mono Blue Tempo.notes: Delver + all-blue for maximum Force of Will consistency.

UW Delver.notes: Delver + Swords to Plowshares without red.

Stryfo Pile.notes: 4-color midrange/tempo by Stryfo. Leovold + Kolaghan's Command era.

Control.description: Permission-based strategies that win through card advantage and inevitability. Heavy on counterspells, removal, and planeswalkers.

Beanstalk Control.notes: Up the Beanstalk draws cards off 5+ MV spells (Force of Will, Solitude, Fury). Non-Yorion 60-card build.

Beanstalk Control (Yorion).notes: 80-card Yorion companion version. More redundancy, less consistency.

Jeskai Control.notes: Classic UWR control. Swords + Bolt + Force + planeswalkers.

UWx Control.notes: Broad category for UW-based control decks. MTGTop8 umbrella.

UW Miracles.notes: Post-Top ban Miracles. Terminus + Counterbalance without Sensei's Divining Top.

Bant Control.notes: UW control + green for Uro, Endurance, Sylvan Library.

Bant Beanstalk.notes: Beanstalk with green instead of red.

BUG Control.notes: Sultai control. Thoughtseize + Abrupt Decay + Jace.

Grixis Control.notes: UBR control. Kolaghan's Command + Bolt + Thoughtseize.

4/5c Control.notes: Greedy multi-color control. Uses all the best cards from every color.

4 Color Beanstalk.notes: 4-color Beanstalk build. Most common Beanstalk configuration.

4 Color Czech Pile.notes: 2017-2018 era 4c midrange-control. Leovold + Kolaghan's Command + DRS. Died with DRS ban.

4 Color Uro.notes: Uro, Titan of Nature's Wrath as the value engine.

Standstill Control.notes: Standstill + manlands. Draw 3 when opponent plays a spell.

Landstill.notes: Classic Standstill + Mishra's Factory. Old-school control.

UB Control.notes: UB without tempo elements. More removal, fewer Dazes.

UB Midrange.notes: Grindier UB build between tempo and control.

UR Control.notes: UR without Delver. More controlling with Blood Moon potential.

Mono Blue Control.notes: All-blue control. Back to Basics as the lock piece.

Cascade Beanstalk.notes: Beanstalk with cascade spells for extra value.

Sultai Leovold.notes: Leovold, Emissary of Trest era BUG control. Leovold eventually restricted discussion.

UWx Mentor.notes: Monastery Mentor as win condition in UWx control shell.

Sharkstill.notes: Standstill + Shark Typhoon. Draw 3 and make a shark.

Stoneblade.description: Stoneforge Mystic decks that tutor equipment (Batterskull, Kaldra Compleat) in a fair blue shell.

Stoneblade.notes: Generic Stoneblade. UW base with Stoneforge Mystic + equipment.

Jeskai Stoneblade.notes: Adds Lightning Bolt and Pyroblast from red.

Esper Stoneblade.notes: Adds Thoughtseize, Bowmasters, and Vindicate from black.

Bant Stoneblade.notes: Adds Uro, Endurance, Green Sun's Zenith from green.

Abzan Stoneblade.notes: Non-blue Stoneforge with Thoughtseize + green creatures.

Boros Stoneblade.notes: Stoneforge in RW shell. Imperial Recruiter + equipment.

Death and Taxes.description: White-based hatebear/disruptive creature deck using Aether Vial, Thalia, Wasteland, and Rishadan Port to tax and deny resources.

Death & Taxes.notes: Core mono-white or BW Yorion build. Thalia + Stoneforge + Flickerwisp.

Eldrazi and Taxes.notes: D&T core + Eldrazi (Thought-Knot Seer, Reality Smasher). Eldrazi Temple for acceleration.

Steel and Taxes.notes: Artifact-heavy D&T with Steel Overseer or Nettlecyst.

Esper Vial.notes: Aether Vial + Stoneforge + Recruiter in Esper colors. Bowmasters + Brainstorm.

Azorius Vial.notes: UW Vial deck. Adds counterspells to the hatebear shell.

Azorius Phelia.notes: Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd blink value in UW hatebears.

Orzhov Vial.notes: BW Vial with Plague Engineer and Dark Confidant.

Weenie White.notes: Aggressive mono-white. More creatures, fewer taxes.

Mono White Initiative.notes: White Initiative creatures in a D&T shell.

Mono White Prison.notes: Lock pieces (Suppression Field, Ghostly Prison) in mono-white.

Ocelot Pride / Energy.description: MH3 energy card strategies built around Ocelot Pride, Guide of Souls, Ajani Nacatl Pariah, and Amped Raptor.

Ocelot Pride Midrange.notes: The primary energy deck. Boros or Mardu base.

Mardu Energy.notes: Mardu build with Thoughtseize and Bowmasters from black.

Mardu Aggro.notes: Same as Mardu Energy. MTGTop8 naming.

Mardu Ocelot.notes: Mardu build focused specifically on Ocelot Pride synergies.

Boros Energy.notes: Two-color energy. Tighter mana base, less greedy.

Boros Ocelot.notes: Same as Boros Energy with Ocelot focus.

Boros Aggro.notes: Broader Boros aggro, may or may not have energy package.

Naya Energy.notes: Adds green for Collected Company or GSZ.

Jeskai Ocelot.notes: Blue splash for Force of Will and cantrips with energy core.

Esper Ocelot.notes: Esper energy with Thoughtseize and Bowmasters.

Mardu Channeler.notes: Mardu with Dragon's Rage Channeler for graveyard synergies.

Mardu Inti.notes: Mardu build featuring Inti, Seneschal of the Sun.

Show and Tell.description: Cheat Emrakul, Atraxa, or Omniscience into play via Show and Tell or Sneak Attack.

Sneak and Show.notes: Show and Tell + Sneak Attack. Emrakul and Atraxa as threats.

Show and Tell.notes: Same as Sneak and Show. MTGTop8 naming.

Omni-Tell.notes: Show and Tell puts Omniscience into play, then cast everything for free. Wins with Emrakul or Enter the Infinite.

Show and Copy.notes: Show and Tell + Clone effects to copy opponent's best permanent.

Show and Karn.notes: Show and Tell + Karn, the Great Creator for artifact combo.

Sneak Attack.notes: More focused on Sneak Attack than Show and Tell. More creature-heavy.

Storm.description: Cast many spells in one turn, then win with a storm-count payoff (Tendrils of Agony, Empty the Warrens, Grapeshot).

The EPIC Storm.notes: Burning Wish + LED. Most resilient storm variant due to wishboard flexibility.

Ad Nauseam Tendrils.notes: ANT. Past in Flames + Ad Nauseam. Classic storm.

Ruby Storm.notes: Mono-red storm. Birgi + Ruby Medallion + Bonus Round.

Beseech Storm.notes: Beseech the Mirror as tutor + Bargain payoff.

Necro Storm.notes: Necrodominance-fueled storm. Draw many cards, then go off.

Saga Storm.notes: Urza's Saga in a storm shell for artifact tutoring.

Mind's Desire.notes: Older storm win condition. Mind's Desire for storm count = that many free spells.

High Tide.notes: Mono-blue combo. High Tide + Time Spiral + Candelabra for infinite mana. Brain Freeze finish.

TEG.notes: The Elegant Gentleman's Storm. Variant storm build.

Reanimator.description: Put a huge creature in the graveyard, then bring it back to the battlefield cheaply with Reanimate, Animate Dead, or Exhume.

Reanimator.notes: Post-Entomb ban build. Uses Faithful Mending, Careful Study to fill graveyard.

Orzhov Reanimator.notes: WB with Archon of Cruelty and white sideboard.

Worldgorger.notes: Worldgorger Dragon + Animate Dead = infinite mana loop. Win with Shivan Hellkite or Walking Ballista.

Doomsday.description: Resolve Doomsday to stack 5 cards as your library, then draw through them to win with Thassa's Oracle.

Doomsday.notes: DDFT (Doomsday Fetchland Tendrils) evolved into Oracle-based wins. Most skill-intensive combo.

Dimir Necrodominance.notes: Necrodominance as card draw engine to fuel Doomsday piles.

Necro Showdown.notes: Necrodominance + Showdown of the Skalds variant.

Tainted Pact.notes: Tainted Pact (exile library) + Thassa's Oracle. All singletons.

Thassa's Oracle.notes: Oracle combo without Doomsday. Other ways to empty library.

Thassa's Lash.notes: Oracle + Paradigm Shift for instant-speed library exile.

Oops! All Spells.description: Zero-land combo deck that mills its entire library with Balustrade Spy or Undercity Informer, wins with Thassa's Oracle via Dread Return.

Oops! All Spells.notes: The fastest combo in Legacy. Can win turn 1. Zero lands.

Belcher.notes: Goblin Charbelcher with 0-1 lands. Reveals library for lethal damage. Similar speed, different win condition.

Mono Blue Belcher.notes: Blue Belcher with Force of Will backup.

Painter.description: Painter's Servant + Grindstone combo to mill opponent's entire library. Red prison elements with Goblin Welder/Engineer for artifact recursion.

Painter.notes: Primary build. Mono-red or RW base with Goblin Welder, Engineer, Ancient Tomb.

Lands.description: Land-based control/combo using Exploration, Life from the Loam, Wasteland recursion, and Dark Depths + Thespian's Stage for a 20/20.

Lands.notes: The primary build. Punishing Fire + Grove, Maze of Ith, Tabernacle.

Dark Depths.notes: Broader category for Dark Depths combo builds.

Selesnya Depths.notes: GW Depths with Knight of the Reliquary and Elvish Reclaimer.

GWx Depths.notes: GW Depths with a splash color.

Sultai Depths.notes: BUG Depths with Thoughtseize and Brainstorm.

Mono Green Depths.notes: Mono-green Depths. Sylvan Safekeeper + Crop Rotation.

Aggro Loam.notes: Life from the Loam + aggressive creatures. More beatdown than Lands.

Loam.notes: Life from the Loam strategies broadly.

Loam Pox.notes: Loam + Smallpox. Mana denial + value recursion.

Bant Loam.notes: Bant Loam with Knight of the Reliquary.

Dryad Valakut.notes: Dryad of the Ilysian Grove + Valakut, the Molten Pinnacle.

Prison / Stompy.description: Fast mana (Ancient Tomb, City of Traitors) into lock pieces (Chalice of the Void, Blood Moon, Trinisphere) to prevent opponent from playing Magic.

Red Stompy.notes: Mono-red prison. Blood Moon + Chalice + Chrome Mox. The One Ring for card advantage.

Dragon Stompy.notes: Same as Red Stompy. Older name from when it played Dragon creatures.

Mono Red Cauldron.notes: Cauldron Familiar + Witch's Oven in red prison.

Eldrazi.notes: Colorless Eldrazi. Chalice + Thought-Knot + Reality Smasher.

Eldrazi Ramp.notes: Bigger Eldrazi with more ramp (Ugin, All Is Dust).

Affinity Stompy.notes: Artifact aggro-prison. Mox Opal + Chalice + Thought Monitor.

Artifacts Prison.notes: Pure prison artifacts. Chalice + Trinisphere + Ensnaring Bridge.

Blue Artifacts.notes: 8-Cast style. Thought Monitor + Thoughtcast + artifact creatures.

8 Mulch.notes: 8 copies of mulch effects for self-mill artifact synergy.

Echo Affinity.notes: Echo of Creation in an Affinity shell.

Echo Control.notes: Echo of Creation in a control shell.

Emry Affinity.notes: Emry, Lurker of the Loch as artifact recursion engine.

MUD.notes: Metalworker + Karn + big colorless threats. Old-school artifact ramp.

Mono Blue Karn.notes: Karn, the Great Creator artifact toolbox in mono-blue.

Mono Blue Prison.notes: Back to Basics + Narset + artifact lock pieces.

UW Artifacts.notes: UW artifact prison with Swords to Plowshares.

Boros Prison.notes: RW prison with Magus of the Moon + white removal.

Mono Green Prison.notes: Green prison with Choke, Root Maze.

Stax.notes: Smokestacks + Tanglewire resource denial. Classic prison archetype.

Stasis.notes: Stasis + untap effects. Lock opponent out of untap step.

Boros Initiative.notes: Caves of Chaos Adventurer + Solitude + Chalice.

Naya Initiative.notes: Three-color Initiative with best threats from each color.

As Foretold.notes: As Foretold + suspend spells (Living End, Ancestral Vision).

Mystic Forge Combo.description: Artifact combo using Mystic Forge + cost reducers to play the entire deck from the top of the library.

Mystic Forge Combo.notes: Grim Monolith + The One Ring + Mystic Forge engine. Karn as wincon.

Coveted Jewel Combo.notes: Coveted Jewel + flicker effects for infinite mana/cards.

Ironworks Combo.notes: Krark-Clan Ironworks + artifact recursion. More Modern-style.

Paradox Engine.notes: Paradox Engine untap combos with artifact mana.

Paradoxical Outcome.notes: Paradoxical Outcome + cheap artifacts for massive card draw.

Riddlesmith Combo.notes: Riddlesmith + cheap artifacts to dig through deck.

Salvager Combo.notes: Auriok Salvagers + LED = infinite mana. Same as Bomberman.

Bomberman.notes: Auriok Salvagers + Lion's Eye Diamond for infinite mana. Pyrite Spellbomb finish.

Power Artifact.notes: Power Artifact + Grim Monolith = infinite mana. Very old combo.

Tezzerator.notes: Tezzeret, Agent of Bolas as win condition in artifact shell.

Cloudpost.description: Cloudpost + Glimmerpost for massive mana generation. Ramp into huge threats (Ugin, Primeval Titan, Emrakul).

Cloudpost Ramp.notes: The standard build. Cloudpost + Glimmerpost + big threats.

Green Post.notes: Green-based Cloudpost with Primeval Titan and Crop Rotation.

Blue Cloudpost.notes: Blue Cloudpost with counterspells and card draw.

Mono Green Ramp.notes: Green ramp that may or may not use Cloudpost.

Tron.notes: Urza's Tower/Mine/Power Plant for mana. Less common than Cloudpost in Legacy.

Amulet Titan.notes: Amulet of Vigor + bounceland combo. Rare in Legacy, more Modern.

Pox / Mono Black.description: Black-based resource denial using Smallpox, Hymn to Tourach, Liliana, and Wasteland to strip the opponent of all resources.

Pox.notes: Classic Smallpox + Liliana + Hymn. Mana denial + discard.

Mono Black Midrange.notes: Bowmasters + Thoughtseize + Sheoldred's Edict. Grindier than Pox.

Mono Black Aggro.notes: Aggressive mono-black. Dauthi Voidwalker + shadow creatures.

Mono Black Dauthi.notes: Shadow/unblockable theme. Dauthi Voidwalker + Dauthi Horror.

Mono Black Helm.notes: Helm of Obedience + Leyline of the Void = instant mill.

Mono Black Death's Shadow.notes: Death's Shadow in mono-black with Thoughtseize + self-damage.

Mono Black Prison.notes: Black prison with Nether Void, The Abyss, Chains of Mephistopheles.

Mono Black Demons.notes: Demon tribal. Dark Ritual into Griselbrand/Archfiend.

Mono Black Initiative.notes: Initiative creatures with black rituals for acceleration.

8-Rack.notes: Shrieking Affliction + The Rack. Win by keeping opponent's hand empty.

Dark Burn.notes: Black + red burn with Bump in the Night.

Eva Green.notes: Classic BG midrange. Hymn + Pernicious Deed + Tarmogoyf. Named after actress.

Deadguy Ale (BW Aggro).notes: BW aggro-midrange. Stoneforge + Thoughtseize + Vindicate. Classic name.

Death's Shadow.notes: Death's Shadow + self-damage. UBR or Mono-B.

Rakdos Death's Shadow.notes: BR Death's Shadow with Thoughtseize + Bolt.

Helm Combo.description: Helm of Obedience + Rest in Peace or Leyline of the Void = mill entire library for 1 activation.

BW Helm Combo.notes: BW shell for both combo pieces.

Rakdos Helm.notes: Rare BR variant with Leyline of the Void.

Blink / Ephemerate.description: Flicker/blink effects (Ephemerate, Yorion) to repeatedly trigger enter-the-battlefield abilities.

4 Color Blink.notes: 4-color Ephemerate value. Solitude + Fury + Omnath + Yorion.

Bant Blink.notes: Green for Uro and Endurance blink targets.

Orzhov Blink.notes: BW blink with Grief and Solitude.

Natural Order / Green Toolbox.description: Green Sun's Zenith and/or Natural Order toolbox strategies. Tutor for creatures to match any situation.

Cradle Control.notes: Gaea's Cradle + Green Sun's Zenith toolbox. Huge mana generation.

Maverick.notes: GW hatebears with Knight of the Reliquary + GSZ. Classic fair green deck.

Punishing Maverick.notes: Maverick + Punishing Fire + Grove of the Burnwillows.

Bant Order.notes: Natural Order in Bant. Force of Will protection.

Bant Ritual.notes: Bant with mana rituals for early Natural Order.

RUG Order.notes: RUG Natural Order. Reid Duke's GP Providence 2011 deck.

Nic Fit.notes: Veteran Explorer + Cabal Therapy. Ramp into big threats. Anti-meta deck.

Golgari Saga.notes: BG with Urza's Saga artifact package.

Golgari Yawgmoth.notes: Yawgmoth, Thran Physician combo in BG.

Sultai Birds.notes: BUG with Birds of Paradise mana acceleration.

Sultai Nadu.notes: Nadu combo in BUG. Nadu banned but may have existed pre-ban.

Naya Minsc.notes: Naya with Minsc & Boo, Timeless Heroes.

Gruul Midrange.notes: RG midrange. Tarmogoyf + Bolt + Punishing Fire.

Vizier.notes: Vizier of Remedies + Devoted Druid infinite mana.

Tribal.description: Creature-type synergy decks that leverage tribal payoffs.

Elves.notes: Glimpse of Nature + Natural Order + Craterhoof Behemoth. Creature combo.

Goblins.notes: Goblin Lackey + Matron + Ringleader + Muxus. Tribal aggro-combo.

Food Chain Goblins.notes: Goblins + Food Chain for infinite mana/ETBs.

Merfolk.notes: Lord of Atlantis + True-Name Nemesis + Aether Vial. Tribal tempo.

Slivers.notes: Sliver tribal. Aether Vial + sliver lords.

Humans.notes: Five-color humans with Cavern of Souls + Aether Vial.

Spirits.notes: Spirit tribal with Rattlechains and Mausoleum Wanderer.

Rebels.notes: Rebel tutor chain. Lin Sivvi, Defiant Hero.

Kobolds.notes: Zero-mana Kobold creatures + Glimpse of Nature combo.

Ninjas.notes: Yuriko + Changeling Outcast + Ingenious Infiltrator. Ninjutsu tempo.

Infect.description: Poison counter aggro-combo. 10 poison = death. Pump spells on infect creatures for one-shot kills.

Infect.notes: Glistener Elf, Blighted Agent + Berserk, Invigorate, Force.

Infect Shoal.notes: Blazing Shoal version for bigger pump.

Temur Song.notes: Song of Creation + cheap spells. Unusual combo.

Burn.description: Direct damage to the face. Lightning Bolt, Chain Lightning, Eidolon of the Great Revel, Price of Progress.

Burn.notes: Mono-red or RW burn. Budget-friendly. Price of Progress punishes greedy mana bases.

Dark Burn.notes: Black splash for Bump in the Night.

Dredge.description: Graveyard-based strategy using the Dredge mechanic to fill the graveyard, then win with Ichorid, Narcomoeba, and Bridge from Below triggers.

LED Dredge.notes: Lion's Eye Diamond enables explosive starts. Dread Return + Thassa's Oracle or Flame-Kin Zealot.

Hogaak.notes: Hogaak, Arisen Necropolis + Vengevine. Graveyard aggro.

Aluren.description: Aluren enchantment lets you cast creatures with CMC 3 or less for free. Combo with Acererak the Archlich or Cavern Harpy for infinite triggers.

Aluren.notes: Won Legacy Showcase Qualifier April 2026. Combo-control hybrid.

Food Chain.description: Food Chain + Misthollow Griffin or Eternal Scourge = infinite mana (creatures only). Win with Walking Ballista or cast from exile creatures.

Food Chain.notes: Food Chain + Griffin/Scourge combo. Walking Ballista finish.

Enchantress.description: Enchantment-based strategy using Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence to draw cards off every enchantment cast.

Enchantress.notes: Solitary Confinement lock. Elephant Grass. Sterling Grove for protection.

Cephalid Breakfast.description: Cephalid Illusionist + Nomads en-Kor = mill entire library. Win with Thassa's Oracle.

Cephalid Breakfast.notes: Two-card combo that mills your library. Oracle finish.

Stiflenought.description: Stifle or Dress Down the enter-the-battlefield sacrifice trigger on Phyrexian Dreadnought for a 12/12 on turn 1-2.

Stiflenought.notes: Stifle + Phyrexian Dreadnought. Also uses Dress Down.

White Dreadnought.notes: Dreadnought in white shell with Flickerwisp.

Jund.description: BRG midrange. The 'best cards in three colors' strategy. Thoughtseize + Bolt + Barrowgoyf + Punishing Fire.

Jund.notes: Fair BRG midrange. Less popular post-DRS ban.

Rakdos Discard.notes: BR discard focus. Hymn + Thoughtseize + Bolt.

Grixis Cauldron.notes: Cauldron Familiar + Witch's Oven in Grixis.

Grixis Frog.notes: Psychic Frog era Grixis. Frog now banned.

Dimir Frog.notes: Psychic Frog era UB build. Now banned.

Creativity / Polymorph.description: Indomitable Creativity or Polymorph effects to turn tokens into specific powerful creatures.

4 Color Creativity.notes: Indomitable Creativity into Archon of Cruelty or Emrakul.

Polymorph.notes: Classic Polymorph. Turn token into Emrakul.

Cascade.description: Cascade mechanic to cast free spells. Often paired with suspend cards or specific cascade targets.

Valki Cascade.notes: Cascade into Valki/Tibalt. Rules change nerfed this.

Hypergenesis.notes: Cascade into Hypergenesis to cheat everything into play.

Miscellaneous Combo.description: Various combo decks that don't fit neatly into other categories.

Hive Mind.notes: Hive Mind + Pacts. Opponent can't pay the upkeep cost and loses.

Splinter Twin.notes: Splinter Twin + Deceiver Exarch = infinite tokens. Rare in Legacy.

Neoform.notes: Neoform combo to tutor specific creatures.

Arena Rector.notes: Arena Rector dies, put any planeswalker into play. Omniscience combo.

Jeskai Ascendancy.notes: Jeskai Ascendancy + mana creatures + cantrips = infinite power.

Winota Forces.notes: Winota, Joiner of Forces cheating humans into play.

False Cure.notes: False Cure + Tainted Remedy. Opponent's lifegain kills them.

Treasure Hunt.notes: Treasure Hunt + Reliquary Tower + Lightning Storm. Meme combo.

Battle of Wits.notes: 200+ card deck. Win by having 200+ cards in library. Extreme jank.

Dragon's Approach.notes: 40 copies of Dragon's Approach. Tutor a dragon.

Sudden Substitution.notes: Sudden Substitution + Pact of the Titan to give opponent a Pact they can't pay.

Turbo Necro.notes: Necrodominance turbo. Draw entire deck, win somehow.

Mill.notes: Mill opponent's library as win condition.

Survival - Aggro.notes: Survival of the Fittest aggro. Survival banned.

Survival - Control/Combo.notes: Survival of the Fittest combo/control. Banned.

Mono Blue Narset.notes: Narset, Parter of Veils + Day's Undoing lock.

Counter Top (no thopter).notes: Counterbalance + Sensei's Divining Top. Pre-ban era lock.

Countertop Thopters.notes: Counterbalance + Top + Thopter Foundry + Sword of the Meek.

Thopter Foundry.notes: Thopter Foundry + Sword of the Meek infinite tokens.

Faerie Stompy.notes: Mono-blue prison with Faerie creatures. Chrome Mox + Trinisphere era.

Zoo.notes: Naya aggro. Efficient creatures + Bolt + removal.

Hammer Time.notes: Colossus Hammer + Sigarda's Aid. More Modern, rare in Legacy.

Goblin Welder.notes: Artifact recursion with Goblin Welder as engine.
